## Data, Privacy, Or Safety Impact

Does this affect user-owned health, nutrition, workout, auth, subscription, persisted data, notifications, or sync state?

- [ ] No known data/privacy impact
- [ ] Possible local data issue
- [ ] Possible cloud data issue
- [ ] Possible auth/subscription issue
- [ ] Possible health or fitness data issue
- [ ] Possible security issue

Add details without sharing private data.

## Evidence

Add logs, screenshots, screen recordings, stack traces, or examples if available.

Do not include secrets, tokens, private health data, real user data, production credentials, keystores, or `.env` values.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked existing issues.
- [ ] I can reproduce the issue or explained why reproduction is inconsistent.
- [ ] I removed sensitive personal, health, and credential information.
- [ ] I noted any data, privacy, security, or sync impact.
